'''natoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nibling|nibling]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-t-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nibling|nibling]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| natoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:næteyeth|næteyeth]] || [[word:næteyej|næteyej]] || [[word:næteyesh|næteyesh]] || [[word:næteye|næteye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:natotoyoth|natotoyoth]] || [[word:natotoyoj|natotoyoj]] || [[word:natotoyosh|natotoyosh]] || [[word:natotoyo|natotoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:natoyoth|natoyoth]] || [[word:natoyoj|natoyoj]] || [[word:natoyosh|natoyosh]] || [[word:natoyo|natoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:natofyoth|natofyoth]] || [[word:natofyoj|natofyoj]] || [[word:natofyosh|natofyosh]] || [[word:natofyof|natofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:natoyotho|natoyotho]] || [[word:natoyojo|natoyojo]] || [[word:natoyosho|natoyosho]] || [[word:natoyoko|natoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:natoyoth|natoyoth]] || [[word:natoyoj|natoyoj]] || [[word:natoyosh|natoyosh]] || [[word:natoyo|natoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:natoyothol|natoyothol]] || [[word:natoyojol|natoyojol]] || [[word:natoyoshol|natoyoshol]] || [[word:natoyokol|natoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:natoyothotho|natoyothotho]] || [[word:natoyojojo|natoyojojo]] || [[word:natoyoshosho|natoyoshosho]] || [[word:natoyoko|natoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:natoyothon|natoyothon]] || [[word:natoyojon|natoyojon]] || [[word:natoyoshon|natoyoshon]] || [[word:natoyokon|natoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:natoyothoro|natoyothoro]] || [[word:natoyojoro|natoyojoro]] || [[word:natoyoshoro|natoyoshoro]] || [[word:natoyokoro|natoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
